query:
SELECT 
  cs.id,
  cs.shotNumber,
  cs.videoUrl,
  cs.videoStatus,
  c.title AS campaign_title,
  c.genre
FROM campaign_shots cs
JOIN campaigns c ON cs.campaignId = c.id
WHERE cs.videoUrl IS NOT NULL
  AND cs.videoStatus = 'complete'
ORDER BY c.id, cs.shotNumber;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2NoQxNASu25QqFj.3c7bc1be8a03 --database WKX2kfVZUM23yKDCoTqGRN --execute 
SELECT 
  cs.id,
  cs.shotNumber,
  cs.videoUrl,
  cs.videoStatus,
  c.title AS campaign_title,
  c.genre
FROM campaign_shots cs
JOIN campaigns c ON cs.campaignId = c.id
WHERE cs.videoUrl IS NOT NULL
  AND cs.videoStatus = 'complete'
ORDER BY c.id, cs.shotNumber;
